use_cases: Fan speed control in hardware or appliance UIs
Settings selection with discrete circular options
Mode or preset selection in control panels
Any radial menu or knob-based interface
ai_summary: A circular radial selector component that displays options around a knob-like interface with an indicator dot. Users can select from multiple values arranged in a circle, with visual depth created through layered shadows and concentric circles. Designed for control panel interfaces, settings selectors, or any scenario requiring discrete value selection through a knob metaphor.
